_comment: Illustrative hooks configuration for the Card-Krueger DiD project. Copy relevant entries to .cursor/hooks.json and verify event names match your installed Cursor version before use.

afterFileEdit.description: Run the Card-Krueger verification suite after editing the DiD analysis script. Surfaces a broken estimation step immediately.

afterFileEdit.command: echo '[Hook] Raw data file was edited. Verify this was intentional — AGENTS.md prohibits modifying raw data.' >&2
afterFileEdit.description: Warn if the synthetic panel data file is edited. Raw data should never be modified.

afterShellExecution.command: echo '[Hook] Verification run complete. Check output above before proceeding.'
afterShellExecution.description: Remind the researcher to read verification output before the next step.

stop.command: python3 -c "import datetime; open('notes/orchestration_log.md', 'a').write(f'\n| {datetime.datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\")} | Agent stopped | — | Review diff before merge |')"
stop.description: Append a timestamped stop-event to the orchestration log when the agent session ends.
